hero.subheadline: Start your fundraiser in minutes. Zero platform fees. Secure payments. Real impact.

featured.title: Featured Campaigns
featured.subtitle: Top fundraisers making a difference right now
featured.empty: No campaigns yet. Be the first to start one!

howItWorks.title: How FundRise Works
howItWorks.step1Desc: Create your fundraiser in minutes. Add your story, goal amount, and a photo.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Share your campaign link via social media, email, or messaging to reach donors.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Donations come in securely and funds go directly to your bank account.

trust.title: Why people trust FundRise
trust.zeroFeeDesc: 100% of every donation reaches the campaign organizer. We never take a cut.
trust.secureDesc: All payments processed by Stripe with 256-bit SSL encryption.
trust.fastDesc: Funds hit your bank account within 2–5 business days after a donation.

cta.title: Ready to make a difference?
cta.subtitle: Join millions of people using FundRise to change lives — including their own.

footer.tagline: The world's most trusted free fundraising platform.
